title: Weekly Insights Review
summary:
Read here everything you need to know


Latest Trends
Class society DNV has unveiled the sixth edition of its Maritime Forecast to 2050 report with a new focus on how to overcome the "ultimate hurdle" of fuel availability. Read More

Any future disruptions could push prices sharply higher
Last week saw the European Central Bank following the US Federal Reserve's example with a sizeable interest rate hike to combat the continent's rising prices. Read More

Snapshot of Spot Freight Rates, Supply-Demand Trends, Port Congestions
Prices for iron ore cargoes containing 63.5% iron for delivery to Tianjin rose to around $105, the highest level in nearly three weeks, boosted by the prospect of increased Chinese demand.

children.title: Recent positive developments in the VLCC sector
section_path: Recent positive developments in the VLCC sector
children.section_path_text: Recent positive developments in the VLCC sector
children.summary: While the talk of the town has been of the VLCC sector's spike in rates in recent weeks, this article focuses on some of the key variables that have afflicted these vessels over the past few years and kept market sentiment so low for so long.

children.title: US SPR releases bring much needed supply to a tight market
section_path: US SPR releases bring much needed supply to a tight market
children.section_path_text: US SPR releases bring much needed supply to a tight market
children.summary:

children.title: Production has continued to achieve strong year-on-year growth
section_path: Production has continued to achieve strong year-on-year growth
children.section_path_text: Production has continued to achieve strong year-on-year growth
children.summary:
Coal India produced approximately 46.2 million tons of coal last month, which marks a month-on-month decline of 1.1 million tons (-2%) but a year-on-year increase of 3.6 million tons (9%). Read More
